rules.message: Email open rate below industry average
NPS Score hit new record high!

notifications.title: CPA Alert — Google Ads
notifications.body: Google Ads CPA reached ₹890 — approaching ₹900 threshold. Consider pausing low-performing ad groups.

notifications.title: 🎉 NPS Record: 67
notifications.body: NPS Score reached 67 — highest in GreenTrail history. Q2 advocacy campaigns are resonating strongly.

notifications.title: Trail Safety Blog ROI Low
notifications.body: Content campaign ROI at 2.4× — below 2.5× minimum. Review keyword targeting and update call-to-action copy.

notifications.title: Retention Trending Up
notifications.body: May cohort shows 82% Day-30 retention — highest cohort performance in 2026.

notifications.title: EcoHiker Collab Milestone
notifications.body: EcoHiker Collab surpassed 50,000 conversions. Campaign is now the top-performing in Q2 history.
